sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ قَادَةُ الدُّوَلِ فِي العَاصِمَةِ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ السَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Lideri država sastali su se u glavnom gradu kako bi razgovarali o miru.
sentences.translationEn: State leaders met in the capital to discuss peace.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ مُهِمًّا جِدًّا لِتَحْسِينِ العَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ الجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Sastanak je bio veoma važan za poboljšanje odnosa između susjeda.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting was very important for improving relations between neighbors.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثَ الرُّؤَسَاءُ عَنْ أَهَمِّيَّةِ التَّعَاوُنِ التِّجَارِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednici su govorili o važnosti trgovinske saradnje.
sentences.translationEn: The presidents spoke about the importance of trade cooperation.

sentences.arabic: وَقَّعَ الجَانِبَانِ اتِّفَاقِيَّةً جَدِيدَةً لِتَبَادُلِ الخِبْرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Obje strane su potpisale novi sporazum o razmjeni iskustava.
sentences.translationEn: Both sides signed a new agreement to exchange expertise.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا اللِّقَاءُ إِلَى تَحْقِيقِ الِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي المِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj susret ima za cilj postizanje stabilnosti u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: This meeting aims to achieve stability in the region.
